# This test verifies that MMA repair swaps misplaced non-voters to satisfy
# constraints. All 10 ranges have 3 voters in region a + 2 non-voters (s4 in
# region a, s5 in region b). Constraints require 2 total replicas in region b,
# but only 1 (s5) is there. MMA should swap the non-voter on s4 (region a) to
# a store in region b.
#
# Cluster: 8 nodes, s1-s4 in region a, s5-s8 in region b.
#
# Expected outcome: all ranges satisfy constraints, no violating ranges.

gen_cluster nodes=8 region=(a,b) nodes_per_region=(4,4)
----

# 3 voters in region a, 1 NV misplaced in region a, 1 NV in region b.
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=5 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s2,s3,s4:NON_VOTER,s5:NON_VOTER}:1
----
{s1:*,s2,s3,s4:NON_VOTER,s5:NON_VOTER}:1

# Require 2 total replicas in region b.
set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=5 num_voters=3 constraints={'+region=b':2}
----

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

assertion type=conformance violating=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
mma-repair:
leases#1: first: [s1=10, s2=0, s3=0, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0, s7=0, s8=0] (stddev=3.31, mean=1.25, sum=10)
leases#1: last:  [s1=10, s2=0, s3=0, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0, s7=0, s8=0] (stddev=3.31, mean=1.25, sum=10)
leases#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%, s7=0%, s8=0%]  (sum=0%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=10, s2=10, s3=10, s4=10, s5=10, s6=0, s7=0, s8=0] (stddev=4.84, mean=6.25, sum=50)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=10, s2=10, s3=10, s4=0, s5=10, s6=4, s7=2, s8=4] (stddev=3.93, mean=6.25, sum=50)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%, s7=0%, s8=0%]  (sum=0%)
hash: 41fcd5130c9c854b
==========================
